summary: Iteration 55: Sales History Digital Separation & Team Page Expandable Rows - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Bug fix: Backend /api/invoices/history/by-date now returns separate 'digital' total for digital/GCash payments. Frontend Sales History board shows 5 stat cards (Cash, Digital, Credit, Grand Total, Transactions). Row badges correctly show payment type (GCash/Digital=blue, Cash=green, Credit=amber, VOIDED=gray). Team page user rows are clickable and expand to show detail panel with created date, PIN info, permission preset, and quick action buttons (Edit, Set PIN, Reset PW). Action column buttons work independently without triggering row expand.

SALES_HISTORY_DIGITAL_SEPARATION.GET /api/invoices/history/by-date return: PASS - Returns separate 'digital' total (e.g., 9980.0) alongside 'cash' and 'credit'
SALES_HISTORY_DIGITAL_SEPARATION.5 stat cards in Sales History board: PASS - Cash Sales, Digital Sales, Credit Sales, Grand Total, Transactions all visible
SALES_HISTORY_DIGITAL_SEPARATION.Legacy invoices without payment_type def: CONFIRMED - Expected behavior per problem statement

TEAM_PAGE_EXPANDABLE_ROWS.Detail panel shows PIN info: PARTIAL - Only shows if PIN was set by someone
TEAM_PAGE_EXPANDABLE_ROWS.Quick action buttons in detail: PASS - Edit, Set PIN, Reset PW buttons visible
TEAM_PAGE_EXPANDABLE_ROWS.Action column buttons don't trigger expa: PASS - stopPropagation working, edit dialog opens separately

PREVIOUS_FEATURES_WORKING.Settings page My Account tab: PASS - Profile, Change Password, My PIN sections
PREVIOUS_FEATURES_WORKING.Settings page Security tab (admin only): PASS - Admin PIN, TOTP, TOTP-Protected Actions

critical_code_review_comments: Backend invoices.py lines 739-777: Correctly separates cash/digital/credit totals using payment_type field
Frontend UnifiedSalesPage.js lines 848-862: 5 stat cards with proper styling and formatPHP display
Frontend UnifiedSalesPage.js lines 893-903: badgeInfo logic correctly categorizes digital/split as blue, credit/partial as amber, cash as green
Frontend TeamPage.js lines 325-352: expandedUser state toggle works on row click, stopPropagation on action buttons column
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing invoices for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 focused on: 1) Sales History board digital separation - Backend returns separate 'digital' total, frontend shows 5 stat cards (Cash, Digital, Credit, Grand Total, Transactions). Row badges now properly categorize payments: GCash/Digital (blue), Cash (green), Credit (amber). Note: Legacy invoices without payment_type field default to 'cash' which is expected. 2) Team page expandable rows - Click user row to toggle inline detail panel showing created date, permission preset, and quick action buttons. Action column buttons (Edit, PIN, etc.) have stopPropagation and don't trigger expand. The /sales-new route has the UnifiedSalesPage with New Sale/Sales History tabs. The /sales route has a different SalesPage (table view). Both Settings tabs (My Account, Security) working for admin.
